seo.title: Web Design in Nova Scotia for Local Businesses | Hatt Digital
seo.description: I build clean, mobile-friendly websites for Nova Scotia trades and local businesses — straight pricing from $500, live in 1–3 weeks, and you own everything.

hero.title: A website that gets you calls, built by **someone you can actually phone.**
hero.sub: I’m Evan. I build clean, mobile-first websites for contractors and local businesses across Halifax, Dartmouth, and the South Shore. You get a flat quote up front, a site live in 1 to 3 weeks, and you own every piece of it.

compare.heading: Your website should make people trust you before they call.
compare.intro: Drag the slider to compare an outdated website with a clean, mobile-friendly version built for local contractors. The goal is simple: make your services clear, build trust fast, and make it easy for customers to call or request a quote.
compare.disclaimer: Example mockup, not a real client’s site — it shows the standard I build to.
benefits: You own the domain, site, and content

start.heading: Ready to get your website handled properly?
start.body: Tell me about your business, your goals, and a budget you’re comfortable with, and I’ll put together a fair, all-in quote built around what you actually need. No pressure — even if you’re still deciding.
steps: Choose the website option that sounds closest to your needs
Tell me your goals, timeline, and a comfortable budget
I reply with a clear, fair quote — usually within one business day
We refine it together until it’s right, then I build it

work.heading: Demo websites — judge the quality bar yourself.
work.intro: No borrowed logos and no invented clients. These are sample builds I made for the kinds of trades and local businesses I want to work with. Open one on your phone — that’s the quality your project gets.

cases.alt: Electrical contractor website demo built by Hatt Digital
cases.title: Electrical Contractor Website
cases.desc: A demo website for an electrical contractor. Services are laid out clearly, trust details are up front, and requesting a quote takes one tap.

cases.alt: Marine services website demo built by Hatt Digital
cases.title: Marine Business Website
cases.desc: A demo website for a marine service business. Services are organized simply and the contact details are easy to find on any screen.

cases.alt: Toner and office supplies website demo built by Hatt Digital
cases.title: Toner Supplies Website
cases.desc: A demo website for an office and toner supply business. Browsing products is simple and requesting a quote is obvious.

pricing.heading: Straight prices, not “contact us.”
pricing.intro: Nobody around here puts prices on the page, so here are mine. Every project still gets a flat, all-in quote — these ranges are just where most projects actually land.
pricing.foot: Every quote is flat and all-in — the number we agree on is the number you pay. Not sure where you fit? Tell me your budget and I’ll tell you straight what it buys.

tiers.name: Starter Website
tiers.label: Most land between $500–$800
tiers.sub: A clean, focused one-page site that gets your business online properly — usually live in about a week once I have your content.
features: You own the domain and site

tiers.name: Business Website
tiers.label: Most land between $900–$1,500
tiers.sub: A multi-page site for service businesses that need more trust and better structure before customers reach out — usually live in 2–3 weeks.

tiers.name: Growth Website
tiers.label: Quoted flat, by scope
tiers.sub: For booking or quote flows, editable content, extra service or location pages, and custom features — I scope it with you and quote one flat number.

earns.eyebrow: How a website earns its keep
earns.heading: Your website should do more than sit there.
earns.intro: A good site guides people from “just looking” to actually reaching out — with clear messaging, trust, speed, and simple ways to contact you.

steps.title: Clear first impression
steps.text: Visitors instantly understand what you do and who it’s for — no scrolling to figure it out.

steps.title: Proof you’re real
steps.text: Professional design, local details, and the small signals that tell people you’re legit and nearby.

steps.title: Easy to reach you
steps.text: Obvious calls, forms, maps, and buttons that make getting in touch take one tap, not three.

steps.title: A real enquiry
steps.text: The visitor becomes a call or message in your inbox — instead of quietly leaving for a competitor.

whyhd.heading: One person, straight answers.
whyhd.intro: Bigger agencies are a good fit for bigger companies. I built Hatt Digital for local businesses that want a clean, professional website without a bloated process or unclear pricing.

points.title: You work directly with the builder
points.text: The person you talk to is the person designing and building your site.

points.title: One point of contact
points.text: From first call to launch, you deal with me — no account managers or ticket queues.

points.title: Mobile-first as standard
points.text: Most customers see you on a phone first, so every site is built to look sharp there.

points.title: Clear, flat quotes
points.text: You see one all-in number before work starts. No surprise invoices later.

points.title: Local SEO basics included
points.text: The setup that helps nearby customers find you — not an upsell.

points.title: Built to get you contacted
points.text: Every page points toward calls, messages, and quote requests.

diy.heading: Why not just use Squarespace or Wix?
diy.intro: Website builders are useful tools — but the tool isn’t the strategy. You can spend hours dragging sections around and still end up with a site that looks okay yet doesn’t explain your offer clearly, build trust, show up properly on Google, or turn visitors into calls and quote requests.
diy.cta_heading: Want the site handled properly from the start?
diy.cta_body: You could build it yourself — but if you want it done right and built around getting leads, I can handle it.

cards.title: Templates aren’t a strategy
cards.text: A template gives you a starting point. It doesn’t know what your customers need to see, what questions they have, or what makes them trust your business.

cards.title: A good website is more than how it looks
cards.text: The structure, copy, mobile layout, service pages, calls-to-action, contact flow, SEO basics, and trust signals all matter just as much as the design.

cards.title: You don’t need another project
cards.text: You already have a business to run. Hatt Digital handles the structure, design, setup, forms, mobile layout, launch details, and cleanup for you.

cards.title: Built to get contacted, not just look nice
cards.text: A nice-looking site isn’t the goal. The goal is to help people understand your business, trust it, and reach out.

local.heading: Your website, built by the person you actually talk to.
local.body1: Hatt Digital is run by Evan Hatt, right here in Nova Scotia. That means you’re not being passed between salespeople, account managers, and developers. You deal directly with the person designing, building, and launching your website.
local.body2: I work with local businesses across Halifax, Dartmouth, Bedford, the South Shore and beyond — contractors, trades, and service businesses that want a site that actually brings in work.

process.heading: From first message to launch — no mystery.
process.intro: You’ll always know exactly where things stand and what happens next.

steps.title: Chat
steps.text: A quick, free call — usually 15 minutes — so I understand your business and what you actually need. Zero pressure.

steps.title: Plan & quote
steps.text: Within one business day you get a flat, all-in price and a real timeline. The number we agree on is the number you pay.

steps.title: Design & build
steps.text: Weeks 1–2: I design and build, you review, and we refine it together until it’s right.

steps.title: Launch
steps.text: Most sites go live in 2–3 weeks total. I check everything works, show you how to run it, and stay reachable after.

reviews.heading: Real reviews will live here.
reviews.intro: Hatt Digital is a new studio, and I won’t fake this part. There are no stock quotes or invented names here — real client reviews get added only when real clients give permission, and they’ll appear exactly as written.

quotes.quote: Client feedback coming soon. This space is reserved for real reviews from local businesses I’ve worked with.
When a client leaves feedback, it shows up here exactly as they wrote it — nothing invented, nothing polished up.

invite.title: Have we worked together?
invite.text: Your honest feedback can be featured here. Get in touch and let me know how it went.

faq.heading: Questions business owners ask me.
faq.intro: The honest answers to the things people want to know before they reach out.
faq.cta_heading: Got a question that isn’t here?
faq.cta_body: See the full FAQ, or just send it over and I’ll give you a straight answer.

items.q: How much does a website cost?
items.a: Most Starter sites land between $500–$800, and most Business sites between $900–$1,500. Bigger builds are quoted by scope. Either way you get one flat, all-in number before work starts — and whatever we agree on is what you pay.
Most sites go live within 2–3 weeks once I have your content. A simple one-page site can be ready in about a week.

items.q: Why not just use Wix or Squarespace?
items.a: Those builders are good tools, but the tool isn’t the strategy. Most owners don’t have the time or the design, SEO, and copywriting know-how to turn a template into a site that actually brings in leads. That’s the part I handle.

items.q: What happens after I request a quote?
items.a: I reply within one business day with honest advice and clear next steps. If a quote makes sense, you get one flat number and a real timeline. No pressure — even if it’s just feedback on what you already have.

cta.heading: Want a straight answer about your website?
cta.body: Send me your current site or what you need built. I’ll reply within one business day with honest advice and a flat quote — and if we work together, the domain, the site, and the content are yours from day one.
